title: コマンド/vote が正常に作動しているか徹底的に調査してください
summary_text: `/vote` is functioning in the active runtime, but in degraded `triad` mode with intermittent provider abstains and long runtimes. - Active runtime mode is `codex` (so `--no-claude` path/triad is expected): [current_mode](/Users/masayuki/.claude/fallback/current_mode#L1) - `PreToolUse` is wired to `auto-vote.sh` with `timeout: 160` (so hook is no longer the old 15s bottleneck): [settings.json](/Users/masayuki/.claude/settings.json#L429) - Hook timeout source is `consensus.timeouts.hook = 150000` ms and voter timeout is `120000` ms (timing now consistent): [quality-gates.json](/Users/masayuki/.claude/rules/quality-gates.json#L38), [auto-vote.sh](/Users/masayuki/.claude/hooks/auto-vote.sh#L115), [auto-vote.sh](/Users/masayuki/.claude/hooks/auto-vote.sh#L210) - Consensus now uses provider preflight filtering (helps avoid dead paths): [consensus-vote.js](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/consensus-vote.js#L503) Latest consensus log file: - [2026-03-11.json](/Users/masayuki/.claude/logs/consensus/2026-03-11.json) (newest file under `logs/consensus`) Newest run IDs seen (latest first from that file): 1. `63dfdc1a-2d2c-4124-ba22-8374fe24e94d` (`CONDITIONAL`, `triad`, `totalVoters: 5`, `totalElapsed: 120.18s`) 2. `a1cf7b04-d118-47dd-8a50-a824c91ac7bc` (`CONDITIONAL`) 3. `bd6ea986-3ff3-4294-88eb-e264d0eab1d9` (`CONDITIONAL`) 4. `251912f5-4c02-4a86-a575-b499c5ed4eb6` (`BLOCKED`, low-voter/abstain case) No edits were made.
